---

name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for next-rbac
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
-------------

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem you are trying to solve.

Example:

> I want to protect resources based on tenant ownership but currently have to duplicate policy logic.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or API you would like to see.

Example:

```ts
auth.can(user, "update", post, {
  tenantId
});
```

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Use Cases

Describe real-world scenarios where this feature would be useful.

* Use case 1
* Use case 2
* Use case 3

## Impact

Which area of next-rbac would be affected?

* [ ] Core
* [ ] React
* [ ] Next.js
* [ ] Express
* [ ] NestJS
* [ ] Documentation
* [ ] Developer Experience
* [ ] Performance

## Performance Considerations

Could this feature impact:

* Bundle size?
* Runtime performance?
* Memory usage?

Please explain if applicable.

## Additional Context

Add any relevant links, references, examples, benchmarks, diagrams, or screenshots.
